posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — Forget about cash transfer. Even stock transfer process is so complicated for normal people.

posts.author: BB789
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — Brokers also make some money on interest on unused funds

posts.author: siva
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — This is not possible, payout has to hit registered client bank account and broker won’t have any control of client bank accounts.

posts.author: niftymonk
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — US brokers its possible BTW.

posts.author: bearishbhaiya
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — AFAIK, SEBI wouldn’t allow this. UPI directly from the trading account isn’t really possible since funds have to stay until settlement, etc. Maybe if regs change someday, something like this could open up.

posts.author: BB789
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — Pretty sure it’s never gonna happen

posts.author: Passionate_trader
posts.text: Broker to Broker Fund Transfer — @nithin Can zerodha build something for fund transfer from other brokers trading account to zerodha and vice versa. Because i have account with three brokers and each time when i have to transfer funds from one account to the other i have to do many steps, first wait for fund withdrawl from first broker it takes few hours and then i have to add the same amount to my second trading account. And can zerodha work on UPI payment done directly from zerodha mobile app and amount get deduct from trading account? Does SEBI allows these kind of products?
